title: Stint-progress versus race-progress contrast
summary: Compare how deep the current tyre stint is with how deep the race is.
rationale: A tyre that is old relative to the race phase is a stronger pit signal than age alone. Several strong baselines included tyre-life-to-lap and tyre-life-to-race ratios.
implementation_hint: Add `TyreLife` divided by `LapNumber`, `TyreLife` divided by estimated total laps, `TyreLife` divided by estimated laps remaining, and interactions with `Stint` and compound expected life.
expected_effect: Small to medium ROC AUC gain with high confidence.
risk: Early-race denominators can be small; use guarded denominators and missingness flags.
